creator: ben@desync.com
text:
(In reply to Justin Hibbits from comment #55)
It's better than without any patch, but the system still hangs periodically.  My detector for this (in case you can't hear the fans) is:

# d=0; while true; do nd=$(date +%s); expr $nd - $d | egrep -v '^[12]$'; d=$nd; sleep 1; done
1742027912
84
127
127
96

The same thing also happens with my last patch using stuff from atomic(9), but it has not happened in ~12 hours using the patch with mb()s sprayed everywhere.  Is it possible that something isn't right with the atomic functions?
